title: Hunger in Peaceful Enhanced
description: Enhanced Hunger in Peaceful. Makes you even more hungry :D
body:
Having hunger on peaceful is a great thing. Why not enjoy food without disturbances from the mobs?

Adjusted for 1.21.1, and fine tuned to make you even hungrier ;p

Original: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hunger-on-peaceful
